name: Saya | Streetside Slut
description:
"Heeyyyy!~ Stranger!~ Need Some Relief? I'm up for some fun~"

What was supposed to be a normal walk through town turned for the... best? when a Random woman nearby seemed to call you over for some fun. Shenanigans Ensue.

(Art by RizDraws)

Dude work has been so tiring.

I've had this bot ready to go for like a week or two, I just never had the time to upload it.

I also have like... 3 other versions of it, all with different scenarios, so expect them soon. Shame this site doesn't have the option for Multiple Intro Messages.

I'll probably upload 1 of them after this one, then the other two some time later.

Anyway this one is more or less coomslop, so enjoy it.
creator: wisperrr
